assets.tool: OpenAI image generation via Codex imagegen skill
assets.promptSummary: Empty contemporary restaurant pass before service, graphite and stainless steel, white plates, one folded Surplasse orange cloth, soft daylight, no people, no text, no logo and no food.
assets.transforms: Proportional resize and WebP compression at quality 84 for 1600 px, quality 82 for 960 px.
assets.usage: Decorative wide context plane for Onboarding2 and Dashboard2. Empty alternative text.
